task_completion.description: Open the initial floorplan.dxf file in LibreCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreCAD application is open and displays an architectural floor plan. The filename 'floorplan.dxf' should be visible in the window title or tab.

task_completion.description: Create the FIRE-ALARM-DEVICES layer with red color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel shows a layer named 'FIRE-ALARM-DEVICES' with a red color indicator (color index 1).

task_completion.description: Draw four smoke detector circles and one FACP rectangle
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct red circles (smoke detectors) and one red rectangle (FACP) are visible on the floor plan drawing.

task_completion.description: Add text labels for the smoke detectors and FACP
task_completion.visual_evidence: Red text labels 'SD-1', 'SD-2', 'SD-3', 'SD-4', and 'FACP' are visible on the drawing near their respective geometric shapes.

task_completion.description: Create the FIRE-ALARM-WIRING layer with yellow color
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List panel shows a layer named 'FIRE-ALARM-WIRING' with a yellow color indicator (color index 2).

task_completion.description: Draw the wiring polylines connecting the devices
task_completion.visual_evidence: Yellow lines (polylines) are visible on the drawing, connecting the FACP rectangle to the smoke detector circles.

task_completion.description: Save the modified drawing as floorplan_fire_alarm.dxf
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'floorplan_fire_alarm.dxf' or the LibreCAD window title updated to reflect the new 'floorplan_fire_alarm.dxf' filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD graphical interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreCAD's toolbars, menus, layer list, and drawing area, rather than terminal commands or python scripts generating the DXF file.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the DXF file directly using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with raw DXF code being pasted or modified.

integrity.description: The agent used LibreCAD's built-in commands to create entities
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD command line at the bottom of the screen shows evidence of commands like 'circle', 'rect', 'text', or 'polyline' being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_fire_alarm.dxf. The task requires two specific layers: 'FIRE-ALARM-DEVICES' (Red, Color 1) and 'FIRE-ALARM-WIRING' (Yellow, Color 2). The devices layer must contain 4 circles (smoke detectors) labeled SD-1 to SD-4, and a rectangle (FACP) labeled FACP. The wiring layer must contain polylines connecting the FACP to the smoke detectors.
